title: hieracium murorum subsp. pollinarium
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pollinarium is a subspecies of the Hieracium murorum plant, commonly known as the wall hawkweed, which is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. pollinarium include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. pollinarium typically involve making teas, tinctures, or infusions from the plant's leaves and flowers, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
